validatorsChanged: source value kind metadata for CssGap/accel profile

rows.sourceEvidence: CssGap supports one to four integer components.
rows.repairPolicy: Accept one to four non-negative integer components; reject empty, non-integer, more than four components, and config-breaking text.
rows.conservativePolicy: Negative values are rejected by app policy even though source stores signed integer components.

rows.sourceEvidence: CssGap supports one to four integer components and layout consumers use side values directly.
rows.repairPolicy: Accept one to four non-negative integer components; reject empty, non-integer, more than four components, and config-breaking text.
rows.conservativePolicy: Negative values are rejected by app policy pending layout-risk approval.

rows.sourceEvidence: Consumer supports empty/default, adaptive, flat, and custom numeric point profiles.
rows.repairPolicy: Accept empty, adaptive, flat, and custom <finite step> <finite point...>; reject unknown freeform values.
rows.conservativePolicy: Custom profiles require at least one point after step.

rows.sourceEvidence: Consumer splits on spaces and parses finite doubles inside custom acceleration profile branch.
rows.repairPolicy: Accept finite space-separated doubles with positive step and at least one point; reject comma values, NaN/inf, invalid tokens, and unsafe text.
rows.conservativePolicy: Context metadata explains the row is meaningful only with custom accel profile.
